caption: A woman with dark hair and black-rimmed glasses is speaking against a plain dark gray background. She wears a light green, short-sleeved top featuring decorative red and white embroidery along the neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to her shirt. In the bottom left corner of each frame, a small gold and red logo with the text "NPTEL" is visible. Throughout the sequence, the woman is engaged in speaking, with her mouth opening and closing. She uses her hands to gesture, moving them from a position in front of her chest toward her sides and then bringing her left hand up toward her shoulder. Her expression remains focused as she communicates, while the background and her clothing remain constant across the frames.
